candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue figure; matches Total Revenue values but is the base line item, and rules prefer the component/base row over duplicated total.
Duplicate of Revenue; labeled as a total, and rules say prefer the component when duplicated, so not chosen.
This is cost of goods sold, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not total revenue.
Balance sheet liability, not revenue line item.

variables.notes: Revenue and Total Revenue are duplicates; chose base Revenue per instructions.

candidates.why: Explicit income statement cost of sales line; this is the standard COGS concept.
Asset prepayments, not period expense COGS.
Inventory balance, not COGS expense.
Classic SG&A-type overhead (staff/personnel expenses) and not labeled as COGS or depreciation; fits SG&A components.
Broad operating overhead bucket; standard SG&A component when no single SG&A line is given.
Share-based compensation is typically part of SG&A; row name indicates stock option costs, so include as SG&A component.
Explicit share-based comp, usually recorded in SG&A; fits SG&A component definition.

variables.notes: No single consolidated SG&A line; following rule (c) we include main overhead buckets and stock-based comp components.
No R&D-related candidate rows were provided; treat XRD as zero per instructions.

candidates.why: Primary income statement interest expense line; best representation of total interest cost (apart from lease-specific and excluded variants).

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities only; a subset of total interest expense, not chosen as the main XINT measure.
Interest excluding leases; incomplete for total interest expense measure, so not preferred over the full Interest Expense line.
Capitalized interest rather than expense recognized in P&L; not the desired XINT line.
Minority interest, not interest expense.
Equity attribution item, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; subset, not total interest expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Debt balance, not expense.
Equity item, not interest.
Equity item, not interest.
Appears in capital lease maturity disclosure; could be interest-related but supplemental and not the main income statement interest expense.

variables.notes: Selected the main Interest Expense line from the income statement as the representative XINT.

candidates.why: Income statement item, not equity balance.
Component of equity, but not total book equity.
Explicit total equity / shareholders’ equity on the balance sheet; matches BE definition.
Balancing artifact, not actual equity total.
Balancing row, not the primary equity figure.
Balancing artifact, not the substantive equity line.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing item for total L+E, not equity alone.
Total of liabilities plus equity; not pure equity.

variables.notes: Chose the main Total equity balance sheet line as book equity.

candidates.why: P&L attribution to minority interests; valid MIB candidate but not the balance sheet stock of non-controlling interests.
Similar to above; income statement attribution.
Balance sheet line capturing the minority interest in equity; best match for MIB definition.
Alternate label for minority equity; also valid but duplicate concept with Non-controlling interests.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to minorities, not the balance sheet minority interest amount.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet Non-controlling interests as the minority interest (MIB) stock.
